summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FlowIQ PWA Widget feature. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Widget functionality mostly working with excellent mobile UI, gamification features, and transaction creation. Minor issues with form reset and install banner visibility.

ui_bugs.issue: Amount input not properly reset after 'Add Another' button click
ui_bugs.details: After clicking 'Add Another' button, the form returns to widget input but the amount field retains the previous value instead of being cleared.

integration_issues.issue: Install banner not appearing on dashboard
integration_issues.details: Install banner may have been previously dismissed or conditions not met for display. Banner functionality exists in code but not visible during testing.

passed_tests: All backend APIs (9/9 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Widget page /widget loads with mobile-optimized UI
Widget displays today's spending total ($661.54) and expense count (6)
Amount input accepts numbers and allows manual entry
Category grid displays all 8 categories correctly (Food, Transport, Shopping, Subscriptions, Entertainment, Bills, Health, Travel)
Category selection shows emoji in selected state (🍕 for Food, 🚗 for Transport)
Save button creates transaction via POST /api/transactions successfully
Success animation shows with category emoji, points (+10 pts), and confetti effects
Success screen displays amount, milestone messages, and bonus points
Add Another button returns to widget input form
Arrow button navigates to full dashboard successfully
PWA manifest.json is accessible at /manifest.json with correct configuration
Transaction creation updates today's stats in real-time
Mobile viewport optimization with rounded corners and full-width buttons
Gamification features working (points, streaks, milestone celebrations)

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (2 minor issues: form reset and install banner visibility)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor widget issues: 1) Ensure amount input is properly cleared after 'Add Another' button click in WidgetPage.jsx, 2) Investigate install banner visibility conditions in Dashboard.jsx - may need to clear localStorage or adjust display logic. All core functionality is working excellently.
